description: Methods from primary literature (paper-extracted). Agent can query these skills but is not forced to use them. Some skills may NOT match simple tasks - agent should assess relevance.
sys_prompt_addition: Paper-derived skills are available as reference materials. You may query them when facing difficulties, but you are not required to use them. IMPORTANT: Some skills may describe complex methods (workflows, statistical analysis) while the task may be simple (data conversion, file merging). Assess the relevance carefully - use the skill only if it truly applies to your task. Ignore mismatched skills and use your baseline knowledge instead.
design_principle: Skills reflect original paper content. Some skills may not match simple tasks - this is intentional for testing agent's ability to assess relevance.
